metaTitle: Wedding photographer Tyrol | unforgettable moments in the Alps
metaDescription: Modern wedding photography & elopements in Tyrol and the Alps – emotional wedding reports in the mountains

hero.title: Adventure on cloud nine
hero.copy: Elegant, calm and emotional reports for weddings in North and South Tyrol

about.title: Calm, profound images with a noticeable lightness
about.copy1: Between mountains, light and space, wedding pictures are created in the Tyrolean Alps that appear calm, remain authentic and tell your story sensitively.
about.copy2: I live and work in Innsbruck and know many special places in Tyrol and the Alps where intimate weddings, elopements and quiet couple moments unfold their own magic. My focus is on uniting the quiet power of the mountains with your connection - for images that feel light and deeply touching at the same time.
about.copy3: For me it's about every single moment - and at the same time about telling your day as a coherent, emotional story. Every report should have closeness, calm, light and personality - modern, emotional and without any artificial staging.
about.copy4: If you are planning your wedding or elopement in Tyrol, I will accompany you from the first thought to the quiet and big moments of your day. This creates images that not only preserve memories, but also make your wedding in the mountains tangible years later.

portfolio.title: Between closeness and nature: selected insights into weddings, elopements and intimate couple moments.

services.title: Couple shoots, weddings and civil ceremonies with space for truly unforgettable moments

weddings.title: Ganztagesreportagen in Tirol und den Alpen

elopements.title: Intime Berghochzeiten und Elopements
highlights: Location Ideen in Tirol, Innsbruck und Dolomiten
Timeline Hilfe fuer Licht und Ablauf

faq.question: Do you photograph weddings and elopements throughout Tyrol?
faq.answer: Yes. I photograph weddings mainly in North and South Tyrol but also throughout Europe.

faq.question: How early should we reach out?
faq.answer: For popular summer and fall dates, ideally 9 to 12 months in advance, but we can also find a date for those who decide quickly.

faq.question: How many hours of coverage are possible?
faq.answer: I accompany both intimate civil weddings with a shorter framework and all-day weddings. The exact duration depends on your routine, your plans and what really feels right for the day.

faq.question: Do you help with locations and timing?
faq.answer: Yes. Especially for elopements and mountain weddings, I am happy to help with locations, light, timing and a timeline that feels calm while still working smoothly.

faq.question: What happens if the weather changes in the mountains?
faq.answer: In Tyrol and across the Alps, I always plan with alternatives in mind. Mountain weather can shift quickly, so I think through backup locations, flexible timing and quieter options from the start.

faq.question: How many images will we receive?
faq.answer: That depends on the length and rhythm of the day. Larger weddings usually result in a more extensive gallery, while elopements are often smaller but very focused. What matters most to me is delivering a complete and coherent story.

faq.question: When will we receive our photographs?
faq.answer: You will receive a preview shortly after the wedding. The full gallery is delivered carefully edited within a few weeks, depending on the season and the scope of coverage.

faq.question: Are all images edited?
faq.answer: Yes. Every image you receive is carefully selected and edited in my style. The result stays natural, calm and timeless, without heavy or artificial effects.

faq.question: Do we receive an online gallery?
faq.answer: Yes. You will receive your photographs in a private online gallery that is easy to share with family and friends. It allows you to view, download and revisit the images with ease.

faq.question: Can we order albums or fine art prints through you?
faq.answer: Yes, absolutely. Beautiful albums and prints are an important part of how memories stay present, and I am happy to guide you through the options after the wedding.

faq.question: Can we meet before booking?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Before booking, we can arrange a video call or, if it suits, meet in person. That way we can see whether the connection and the collaboration feel right for both sides.
